params.name: date
params.description: Specific date (YYYY-MM-DD). Cannot be combined with from/to.

params.name: to
params.description: End of date range (YYYY-MM-DD). Defaults to today.

params.name: quotes
params.description: Comma-separated list of quote currencies to include

params.name: providers
params.description: Comma-separated list of data providers to include

params.name: group
params.description: Downsample rates by time period. Only applies to date ranges.

params.name: expand
params.description: Comma-separated list of optional fields to include per record. Currently supports `providers`, which adds an array of `{ key, rate }` objects per record showing each provider's individual rate. Outliers excluded from the blend (and providers whose rate was overridden by a currency peg) are flagged with `excluded: true`. The field is omitted on synthesized peg rows where no provider published the quote. In CSV output, the `providers` column is encoded as `KEY:RATE` pairs joined by `|`, with a trailing `*` on excluded entries (e.g. `ECB:0.92|FED:1.50*`).

items.docs: Returns exchange rates blended across providers. Without date params, returns the latest rates. Each record is a single currency pair.

info.name: Frankfurter Get a Single Exchange Rate Pair

params.name: date
params.description: Specific date (YYYY-MM-DD). Cannot be combined with from/to.

params.name: providers
params.description: Comma-separated list of data providers to include

items.docs: Returns the blended exchange rate for a single currency pair. Without a date param, returns the latest rate.
Returns details for a single currency, including provider information or peg metadata.

params.name: scope
params.description: Set to 'all' to include legacy currencies

params.name: providers
params.description: Comma-separated list of data providers to include

items.docs: Returns available currencies with their names and date ranges. By default, only active currencies are included.
Returns available exchange rate data providers with their base currency.
